title: Proclamation No. 30, s. 1936
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 30

RESERVING FOR COLONIZATION PURPOSES A PARCEL OF LAND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUBURAN, PROVINCE OF LANAO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

Pursuant to the provisions of Act Numbered Forty-one hundred and ninety-seven and upon the recommendation of the Director of Lands, concurred in by the Directors of Forestry, Plant Industry, Health, and Public Works, I hereby reserve for colonization purposes, under the administration of the Secretary of Labor, subject to private rights, if any there be, and the future survey and delimitation that may be made, the following-described parcel of the public domain situated in the Municipality of Tuburan, Province of Lanao, Island of Mindanao, to wit:

Tuburan, Lanao project No. 35—B (Property) alienable and disposable .—North 6 W., 1,600 m. to point 2; N. 21ْ E., 300 m. to point 3; N. 83ْ E., 80 m. to point 4; N. 49ْ W., 210 m. to point 5; N. 83ْ E., 180 m. to point 6; N. 44ْ E., 100 m. to point 7; W., 210 m. to point 8; N. 6ْ W., 140 m. to point 9; N. 6ْ W., 230 m. to point 10; N. 39ْ W., 180 m. to point 11; N. 42ْ W., 300 m. to point 12; N. 34ْ E., 160 m. to point 13; point 98, Aglaia sp. 50 cm.; point 99, bayok 40 cm.; point 100, white lauan 70 cm.; point 101, unknown 80 cm.; point 102, lamog 60 cm.; point 103, lamog 30 cm.; point 104, white lauan 30 cm.; point 105, loktob 60 cm.; point 106, Ficus sp. 60 cm.; point 107, mayapis 50 cm., point 108, anabiong 40 cm.; point 109, anabiong 40 cm.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-ninth day of January, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-six, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the first.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary of the Interior
